mapper.update:
update repair_order
status = #{status},
update_time = #{updateTime},
admin_id = #{adminId},
description = #{description},
device_type = #{deviceType},
dorm_num = #{dormNum},
image = #{image},
where id = #{id}
mapper.delete:
delete from repair_order where id in
#{id}
mapper.select: select * from repair_order order by case when status = '待处理' then 1 when status = '处理中' then 2 when status = '待确认' then 3 when status = '已完成' then 4 when status = '已取消' then 5 else 6 end
